author: raphael-salaja
abstract: Comprehensive UI/UX best practices and production animation pipeline for web interfaces. Contains 172+ rules across 20 categories covering animation principles, timing functions, exit animations, CSS pseudo-elements, audio feedback, sound synthesis, morphing icons, container animation, laws of UX, predictive prefetching, typography, visual design, tool selection, CSS-native modern animation, FLIP layout animation, reduced motion policy, practitioner knowledge, and library-specific production patterns. Includes deep reference files for GSAP, Framer Motion, WAAPI, Anime.js, CSS-native features, Lottie/Rive, Three.js/WebGL, Paper.js, FLIP technique, pattern recipes, and reduced motion as a design system. Each rule includes detailed explanations and code examples comparing incorrect vs. correct implementations.
